title: narcissus turgidus
intro: Narcissus turgidus, also known as the Tazetta narcissus, is a type of plant that belongs to the genus Narcissus and is a member of the Amaryllidaceae family. It is a bulbous perennial plant with white or pale yellow flowers that have a strong, sweet fragrance. The medicinal properties of Narcissus turgidus include its potential to be used in the treatment of various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Narcissus turgidus can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, and it is also used in homeopathy and aromatherapy to promote overall health and well-being.
